focus: Inventory current template system and map consumer chain

graphEvents.label: check-files infers required docs by numeric level

label: Per-level directories are generated outputs but also public workflow paths
evidence: create.sh, command YAML assets, agents, AGENTS.md, tests, and anchor wrappers reference templates/level_N paths directly.

label: Direct deletion would remove 25 files and 4087 LOC but break create and workflow consumers
evidence: level_1 through level_3+ contain 25 markdown files totaling 4087 LOC; create.sh copies from resolved level directories.

label: Marker prevalence is 5889 occurrences across 3164 files and 713 folders
evidence: rg found 5889 SPECKIT_TEMPLATE_SOURCE occurrences under .opencode/specs; unique marker-bearing folders count is 713.

label: check-files.sh encodes required files by level rather than reading level template directories
evidence: Level 1 requires spec/plan/tasks; Level 2 adds checklist; Level 3 adds decision-record; phase parents branch to spec.md only.

label: Actual wrap-all TS path differs from prompt path
evidence: scripts/templates/wrap-all-templates.ts is absent; scripts/wrap-all-templates.ts and scripts/wrap-all-templates.sh exist.

label: templates tree baseline is 86 files, 83 markdown files, 13115 markdown LOC.
create.sh normal/subfolder creation copies all md files from get_level_templates_dir output using copy_template.
phase parent uses phase_parent/spec.md and addendum/phase snippets; phase children use Level 1 templates.
Minimum source set likely includes core, used addenda, phase templates, cross-cutting templates, changelog templates, and possibly stress_test templates.
create.sh delegates template file copy to copy_template
Documentation level maps to materialized level output directory
Immediate full deletion of level_N directories
reason: Too many direct runtime, YAML, test, and governance path consumers still assume physical level directories.
